name: Microsoft Copilot ROI Playbook for Business Leaders: Adoption to Impact
description:
This session will highlight high-impact Copilot use cases across departments, frameworks for measuring operational efficiency and productivity gains, and proven approaches for driving long-term adoption success.

**Date:** May 29, 2026
**Time:** 9AM- 11AM EST
**[Click Here to Register for the Session](https://www.netcomlearning.com/webinar/microsoft-copilot-roi-playbook-masterclass?advid=1196&utm_source=meetup&utm_medium=organic_social&utm_content=master_classes&utm_term_product=vendor_microsoft)**

This session will provide practical insights into identifying high-impact use cases, overcoming adoption challenges, implementing governance and security best practices, and building a long-term AI strategy that delivers sustainable business value.

**NOTE: "ALL REGISTRATIONS WILL BE PROVIDED WITH DIGITAL ACHEIVEMENT BADGES ISSUED DIRECTLY FROM MICROSOFT"**
**What you will learn:**

* The Copilot Adoption vs ROI Gap
* Why most Copilot Pilots Stall
* High-Impact Copilot Use Cases Across the Organization
* The Executive Framework for Measuring Copilot ROI

[Register Today ](https://www.netcomlearning.com/webinar/microsoft-copilot-roi-playbook-masterclass?advid=1196&utm_source=meetup&utm_medium=organic_social&utm_content=master_classes&utm_term_product=vendor_microsoft)and secure your spot - See You in the Masterclass!!

name: The Future of Communication Technology: Skills & Systems You Need
description:
**Technology and skills are evolving—are you ready for what’s next?**
As organizations embrace hybrid work, both professionals and businesses must adapt to new demands in communication, collaboration, and continuous learning.

Whether you're building your career or leading technology decisions, modern systems need to be secure, scalable, and built for today’s digital workplace.
Many still face challenges with legacy tools, VoIP performance, SIP communication, call control, and integration—making it harder to deliver seamless collaboration and stay competitive.

👉 **Save your free spot now:** **[Link](https://www.netcomlearning.com/webinar/the-new-era-of-work-and-communication-for-IT-teams-with-cisco-collaboration?advid=1196&utm_source=meetup&utm_medium=organic_social&utm_campaign=cisco_fy26_q2&utm_content=organic_listing&utm_term=om)**

This **[complimentary webinar](https://www.netcomlearning.com/webinar/the-new-era-of-work-and-communication-for-IT-teams-with-cisco-collaboration?advid=1196&utm_source=meetup&utm_medium=organic_social&utm_campaign=cisco_fy26_q2&utm_content=organic_listing&utm_term=om)** will help you understand how modern collaboration technologies are transforming enterprise communication and what it takes to build a future-ready environment.
In this session, you’ll explore how solutions like Cisco Webex and Cisco Unified Communications Manager enable unified communication across voice, video, and messaging, while platforms like Webex Contact Center enhance customer experience with AI-driven capabilities.

💡 **Why attend?**

* Understand modern VoIP, SIP, and cloud collaboration architecture
* Learn how to improve performance, security, and scalability
* See how AI is transforming communication and productivity
* Identify key skills needed to support and grow collaboration environments

Whether you're managing infrastructure or contributing to technology decisions, this session will give you practical insights to improve your systems and support your team effectively.

**Don’t miss this opportunity to stay ahead in the evolving world of enterprise communication.**

**Book Your Free Seat Now - [Link](https://www.netcomlearning.com/webinar/the-new-era-of-work-and-communication-for-IT-teams-with-cisco-collaboration?advid=1196&utm_source=meetup&utm_medium=organic_social&utm_campaign=cisco_fy26_q2&utm_content=organic_listing&utm_term=om)**

name: Microsoft AI-Powered Security Masterclass for Nonprofits
description:
*Discover how AI is transforming healthcare delivery and patient outcomes?*
Join this masterclass to explore how Microsoft AI solutions are helping healthcare organizations improve efficiency, streamline clinical workflows, and deliver smarter, more personalized care.

**Date:** June 8, 2026
**Time:** 10AM- 12PM EST
**[Click Here to Register for the Session](https://www.netcomlearning.com/webinar/microsoft-ai-masterclass-for-nonprofits?advid=1593&utm_source=microsoft_community&utm_medium=organic_social&utm_content=master_classes "https://www.netcomlearning.com/webinar/microsoft-ai-masterclass-for-nonprofits?advid=1593&utm_source=microsoft_community&utm_medium=organic_social&utm_content=master_classes")**

Learn how tools like Microsoft Fabric, Azure AI, Dragon, Microsoft 365, and Power Platform are enabling secure data integration, better collaboration, and operational innovation across the healthcare ecosystem.

**NOTE: "ALL REGISTRATIONS WILL BE PROVIDED WITH DIGITAL ACHEIVEMENT BADGES ISSUED DIRECTLY FROM MICROSOFT"**
**What you will learn:**

* Introduction & Overview: AI in Healthcare
* Managing and Integrating Health Data with Microsoft Fabric and Azure
* Improving Clinical Workflows with Dragon and AI Solutions
* Advancing Productivity with Microsoft 365 (Teams & PowerPoint)
* Enabling Innovation with Power Platform
* Q&A

\*\*[Register Today ](https://www.netcomlearning.com/webinar/microsoft-ai-masterclass-for-nonprofits?advid=1593&utm_source=microsoft_community&utm_medium=organic_social&utm_content=master_classes "https://www.netcomlearning.com/webinar/microsoft-ai-masterclass-for-nonprofits?advid=1593&utm_source=microsoft_community&utm_medium=organic_social&utm_content=master_classes")\*\*and secure your spot - See You in the Masterclass!!

name: The Retention ATM: Fix the Leaks Before You Lose Your Team
description: Are you leading a high-performing team — or quietly losing one? Join Dr. Tonicia Freeman-Foster as she reveals the everyday leadership habits that drain team trust and shows you exactly how to fix them.

name: Juneteenth Virtual Happy Hour
description: Grab your favorite drink and join us for a relaxed Juneteenth Virtual Happy Hour designed for connection and fun. Enjoy games, prizes, and easygoing networking with ABWIPPM members from across the association, all from the comfort of home.

name: The Users You’re Missing: Research Tips for Project Managers
description: Who are the users your project may be overlooking? Join Dr. Starlynne Gornail for a practical session on using human-centered research strategies to uncover unmet user needs and create more effective, trusted solutions.
